name: Akobo Minerals
longBusinessSummary: Akobo Minerals AB (publ) operates as a gold exploration and mining company in Ethiopia. The company holds an exploration license covering 182 square kilometers and a mining license covering 16 square kilometers located in the Gambela region and Dima Woreda, Ethiopia. It has interests in the Segele Gold and Joru Gold deposits. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Gothenburg, Sweden.
